creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #6)
> Actually, I'm just a hyperactive regular guy.  I am a thorn in portmgr side.

You should join lurkers! You certainly do tons of that level of work already.

> I'm pretty confident that acm@ will not mind giving the port to a good home.

Done, thanks for the clarification!
